query_string:
with prep_order_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , business_date
    , order_id
  from
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
  group by
    1,2,3
)

, order_log as (
  select
    customer_id
    , min(business_date) as first_business_date
    , min(if(order_seq = 2, business_date)) as f2_business_date
    , min(if(order_seq = 3, business_date)) as f3_business_date
  from (
    select
      customer_id
      , business_date
      , order_id
      , row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by business_date, order_id) as order_seq
    from 
      prep_order_log
  )
  group by
    1
)

, order_week_diff as (
  select
    customer_id
    , first_business_date
    , f2_business_date
    , case
        when f2_business_date is null then null
        else date_diff('week', date(first_business_date), date(f2_business_date))
      end as f2_week_diff
    , f3_business_date
    , case
        when f3_business_date is null then null
        else date_diff('week', date(first_business_date), date(f3_business_date))
      end as f3_week_diff
  from
    order_log
)

, ob_week_diff as (
  select
    customer_id
    , first_business_date
    , f2_business_date
    , f2_week_diff
    , f3_business_date
    , f3_week_diff
    , ob_week_diff
    , td_time_string(
        td_date_trunc('week', td_time_parse(date_format(
          date_add('week', ob_week_diff, date(first_business_date)), '%Y-%m-%d'), 'jst'), 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst') as business_week
  from
    order_week_diff
  cross join unnest(sequence(1, 12)) as t(ob_week_diff)
)

select
  year_of_week(date(business_week)) as "年"
  , week_of_year(date(business_week)) as "週"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12, customer_id)) as "OB顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f2_week_diff between 1 and 4, customer_id)) as "4週以内_F2顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f2_week_diff between 5 and 8, customer_id)) as "5~8週以内_F2顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f2_week_diff between 9 and 12, customer_id)) as "9~12週以内_F2顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f2_week_diff >= 13, customer_id)) as "OB期間外_F2顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f2_business_date is null, customer_id)) as "F2なし顧客数"

  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f3_week_diff between 1 and 4, customer_id)) as "4週以内_F3顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f3_week_diff between 5 and 8, customer_id)) as "5~8週以内_F3顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f3_week_diff between 9 and 12, customer_id)) as "9~12週以内_F3顧客数"
  , count(distinct if(ob_week_diff between 1 and 12 and f3_week_diff >= 13, customer_id)) as "OB期間外_F3顧客数"
from
  ob_week_diff
where date(business_week) >= date('2024-01-01')
      and date(business_week) < date(td_time_string(td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst'))
group by
  1,2
order by
  1,2
